channel.title: Biomimicry on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Biomimicry on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Link: Big Dog Robot by larvalsubjects
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: July 29, 2009.

Reposted June 2026. In 2009 I noted that the author was impressed at how “biological” the robot’s movements looked. I wouldn’t have the same reaction today.

I still understand what I had meant – one should not assume that just because a system seems ‘biological’ that it’s better at its function. (The TARS robots in the movie Interstellar were interesting because they appeared capable and adaptable to a variety of situations, yet with a form factor that was far from biological).
